name: Baker
description: Up before anyone else, asleep before sundown. The baker feeds the town and knows who's hungry, who's celebrating, and who stopped buying bread.
dialogue_hooks: offering a fresh roll while you talk
noting that someone hasn't come in for their usual order
asking if you've seen their flour delivery — it's late
proud story about winning the harvest festival bake-off
worried about grain prices this season
voice_patterns: surprisingly sharp observer behind the friendly exterior

schedule.morning: baking since before dawn, open at first light
schedule.afternoon: selling, restocking, mixing dough for tomorrow
schedule.night: early to bed — the oven won't light itself
